title: Pentagon to pull 5,000 U.S. troops from Germany
description: The Pentagon is reportedly withdrawing 5,000 U.S. troops from Germany after a policy review, prompting concern among Republican lawmakers and European allies.
summary: The Pentagon plans to withdraw 5,000 U.S. troops from Germany following a recent policy review. This decision has raised concerns among Republican lawmakers and European allies regarding security and military presence in the region. The move reflects ongoing shifts in U.S. defense strategy in Europe.

title: Appeals court blocks nationwide mail access to abortion pills
description: A federal appeals court ruling restricts telehealth and mail access to mifepristone, prompting requests for Supreme Court intervention.

title: Iran offers Strait of Hormuz deal as Trump remains dissatisfied
description: Iran has reportedly offered a deal related to the Strait of Hormuz, while President Trump expressed dissatisfaction but signaled a preference for avoiding military action.

title: BBC News faces deep cuts amid plan to eliminate 2,000 jobs
description: BBC News is expected to face major redundancies as part of a corporation-wide cost-cutting plan that could eliminate around 2,000 jobs.

title: New surgeon general nominee faces scrutiny over MAHA ties
description: The Trump administration's new surgeon general nominee is drawing attention and criticism over connections to the MAHA movement.
